TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Devin_Albert, title = Devin_Albert, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Devin_Albert} }

S.FORM: Devin Albert kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 1, Devin Albert, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Devin Albert kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 1, Devin Albert, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *e*in alβert kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *e*in alβert, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
